tests.outside_scope_reason: Summary focuses on i8 examples and direct comparisons, but this tests truncation from i32 to i16 with a non-zero constant (32768 = 2^15) that triggers the FlippedSign.isPowerOf2() path in the SLT handler

alive2.log:
----------------------------------------
define i1 @trunc_slt_nonzero_constant_i16(i32 %x) {
#0:
  %trunc = trunc i32 %x to i16
  %cmp = icmp slt i16 %trunc, 32768
  ret i1 %cmp
}
=>
define i1 @trunc_slt_nonzero_constant_i16(i32 %x) {
#0:
  ret i1 0
}
Transformation seems to be correct!
